description: Style consistent animated pixel art sprite generation
notes: No input_palette on this model — palette conformance is enforced in tools/postprocess.ts (DB32 nearest-color quantize). Spritesheet grid layout is probed empirically and recorded in tools/atlas.config.ts.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

style.description:
Style to apply to the generated image

four_angle_walking: Consistent 4 direction, 4 frame long walking animations of humanoid characters
walking_and_idle: Consistent 4 direction walking and idle animations of humanoid characters
small_sprites: 4 direction 32x32 sprites with walking, arm raising/attacking, looking around, surprised, and laying down animations
vfx: Eye-catching animations for fire, explosions, lightning, or other simple effects

width.description: Animation width. four_angle_walking and walking_and_idle only support 48. small_sprites only supports 32. vfx supports 24-96.

height.description: Animation height. four_angle_walking and walking_and_idle only support 48. small_sprites only supports 32. vfx supports 24-96.

return_spritesheet.description: Return animation as a spritesheet PNG instead of animated GIF
